login.title: Sign in to continue
login.description: Sign in with your credentials or your organization's single sign-on.

productSelect.title: Choose a product
productSelect.description: Select the product you want to work on. You can switch at any time from the sidebar.

products.emptyDescription: No product is currently accessible. Please contact your administrator.

callback.error: We could not complete sign in. Please try again.

expired.title: Your session has expired
expired.description: For your security, please sign in again to continue.

accessDenied.title: No access
accessDenied.description: Your account is not linked to any product. Please contact your administrator.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.ssoInitFailed: Could not start SSO. Please try again.
errors.ssoTokenInvalid: The SSO response was invalid. Please try again.
errors.ssoPopupBlocked: The SSO window was blocked. Allow pop-ups and try again.
